title: The Lost Ring
description: While walking along a quiet path, you notice a beautifully crafted gold ring lying in the dirt. Moments later, an elderly woman comes searching nearby, clearly distressed. She hasn't noticed you yet.

options.title: Return the Ring
options.description: Hand the ring back to its rightful owner.

options.title: Sell the Ring
options.description: The old woman never has to know you found it.

options.title: Keep the Ring
options.description: Perhaps it will prove useful someday.
